All right, Jim Launchers. So far, we've purchased our ClickFunnel account. We have purchased our domain and we've cleared our pathways. We've also imported our funnel, either the 42-day detox or the six-week challenge. So in order to get all of this up and running, we do need to import one other funnel, which is our privacy policy. We do have a privacy policy template that you can edit, though we do not provide legal advice and we do suggest that you speak with an attorney before using the template. If you do have your own privacy policy, please use that. So in order to import the ClickFunnel, we're going to do the same thing we did last time. We're simply going to click on it. So we can see it begin to import. And once it's done, we're going to click on the All Funnels button so we can see everything we have set up. And then we're going to locate the privacy policy. The privacy policy should be clear front and center for you, but we have so many portals in here. So it's going to take me just a second to locate that. You can search. There we go. So now that we have our privacy policy template, we're going to go through the same steps that we went through with our other funnel. So we're going to go to the Settings. And hook up our domain. So we have our MJ's six-week challenge. We're going to change the pathway so that it is more unique and it doesn't say template on it. And scroll all the way down and save and update the settings. We still have two other places where we need to match the pathway. So you can see the pathway doesn't match right now. So we're going to go ahead and update that here on our blue cog. And then we're going to update it. Ooh. So it looks like that wasn't unique enough. So we're going to try a different name. So privacy policy MJ's. There we go. So now that we have something unique enough, we're going to add it in in the bottom black cog as well. So privacy policy MJ's. So as always, we're going to double check that black cog. And if there are any letters, numbers that don't belong there, we're going to delete them and update the page. In order to work with the template, if you do choose to do so, you'll click this edit page button right here. And you'll go ahead and click through enter in your company name, the website URL, et cetera, et cetera. When you're done changing everything, you'll click the save button up here twice. And we'll exit. So now it's time to place our privacy policy inside of our click funnel. So I'm going to go ahead and copy the privacy policy. I'm going to travel over here and I'm going to go to my 42-day detox click funnel. So in order to make life a little bit easier because I have a lot of funnels, I'm just going to type my name in. And here we go. So once I'm in here, my privacy policy needs to go on my first page. So I'm going to go ahead and click the edit page button. And then in order to place my privacy policy, I'm just going to follow these red directions up here. So I'm going to scroll all the way down to where the privacy policy is. And I'm going to click on it. It's going to pop up a window to the right. And I'm going to click set action. Once I'm here, I'm going to make sure that this is set to go to website URL. And I'm going to copy and paste the website URL into here. So once that is done, I'm going to change this from open in the same window to open in a new tab because we don't ever want to send someone away from our click funnel. So from here, I'm just going to click away. And I'm going to place it in the terms of use as well. Our template has both a privacy policy and a terms of use. So I'm okay with doing this. If you have two separate things, then please make sure to put in two different URLs. So I'm using command V to paste that in. Same thing with the open in the new tab. I'm going to click away. And I'm going to hit save twice.
